name: Creamy Spinach & Chicken Saute
recipeIngredient: 6 skinless boneless chicken breast halves (about 1-1/2 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 12-inch skillet with nonstick cooking spray and heat over medium heat.
2. Cook the chicken in the skillet, 2 minutes on each side.
3. Reduce the heat to medium-low.
4. Add milk, broth, and onion; cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until the onion is tender.
5. Stir in the spinach; cook for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring constantly until the spinach is completely wilted and juices of the chicken run clear.
6. Remove the chicken from the skillet and keep warm.
7. Increase the heat to medium.
8. Cook the spinach mixture about 3 minutes or until liquid has almost evaporated.
9. Stir in salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
10. Serve the chicken on top of the spinach.
